## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Anonymity / self-hosting check

flckd's non-negotiables: strict anonymity (no third party ever receives a user's
origin/destination/route; no accounts/PII/persistent identifiers; logs never retain route
coordinates or client IPs) and a fully self-hosted geo stack. Briefly note how your
proposal fits within these — or flag if it has implications for them.

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you weighed.
